1. Clean up the class names to use our existing tailwind.config.js theme if possible.
2. Convert any hardcoded placeholder values (like static strings) into props.
3. Ensure the component follows our project's existing coding standards.
4. If there are any accessibility issues (ARIA labels, etc.), fix them."
